emotion_and_vibe: Premium, serious, clinical precision, high-trust, data-dense but clean. Minimalist 'Linear/Raycast' aesthetic tailored for high-stakes medical admission.

buttons.primary: bg-[#7c6fff] hover:bg-[#6b5ce6] text-white font-semibold py-3 px-6 rounded-md transition-all shadow-[0_0_15px_rgba(124,111,255,0.3)]
buttons.secondary: bg-transparent border border-white/10 hover:border-white/20 text-white font-medium py-3 px-6 rounded-md transition-all
buttons.icon_button: p-2 rounded-md hover:bg-white/5 transition-colors text-zinc-400 hover:text-white

inputs_and_forms.input: bg-transparent border-b border-white/10 focus:border-[#7c6fff] text-white py-3 px-0 rounded-none outline-none transition-colors w-full

pills.mastered: bg-[#22c97a]/10 text-[#22c97a] border border-[#22c97a]/20 px-3 py-1 rounded-full text-xs font-mono uppercase tracking-wider
pills.danger: bg-[#ff4f6a]/10 text-[#ff4f6a] border border-[#ff4f6a]/20 px-3 py-1 rounded-full text-xs font-mono uppercase tracking-wider
pills.confused: bg-[#f5a623]/10 text-[#f5a623] border border-[#f5a623]/20 px-3 py-1 rounded-full text-xs font-mono uppercase tracking-wider

motion.page_entrance: framer-motion initial opacity-0 y-4, animate opacity-100 y-0 stagger 0.1s

hero_dna_visual.description: Abstract 3D glowing DNA helix on dark background, used for the main hero section visualization.

dashboard_bg_texture.description: Subtle dark glassmorphism texture with faint indigo light bleed, used as underlying texture for dashboard or result screens.

behavior_data_visual.description: Abstract network of glowing dots (green, red, amber) representing behavioral analysis. Used in the DNA Report section.

instructions_to_main_agent: Install required dependencies: framer-motion, lucide-react, @radix-ui/react-slot, clsx, tailwind-merge.
Ensure Syne font is loaded from Google Fonts for headings, DM Sans for body text, and DM Mono for numbers.
Implement the cinematic 'MEDHA' text reveal on initial load using framer-motion (mask image or stagger text).

For the DNA Report: utilize the 'Control Room' grid (grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-3). Do NOT use generic soft shadows. Use 1px borders (border-white/10) with subtle tinted backgrounds based on status colors.
Data components (timers, scores, attempt counts) MUST use the 'DM Mono' font for alignment and precise feel.
Include data-testid attributes on all interactive elements (e.g., 'data-testid="start-exam-button"').
Use Lucide icons for UI markers. Avoid filling up the UI with decorative graphics; rely on the provided generated images for atmosphere.
Apply `bg-black/40` to `bg-black/60` gradient overlays over the hero image to ensure Syne headings pop.
AI Study Notes section should look like a highly legible, markdown-styled card using DM Sans, with small mono tags for 'TRAP QUESTION' or 'MEMORY TRICK'.
